task_completion.description: Open the target event in the Odoo Calendar
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the Odoo Calendar event modal or form view is open for the event originally named 'Marketing Campaign Review'.

task_completion.description: Change the event title to the target name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the event title input field has been changed to 'Q3 Marketing Results & Q4 Strategy Planning'.
Look for a screenshot of the event form showing that 'Alice Johnson' and 'Carol Martinez' are still listed in the attendees/guests field.
Look for a screenshot of the event form showing that 'Zoom Meeting' is still present in the location field.
Look for a screenshot of the event form showing that the description still contains 'Review Q3 marketing campaign results'.

task_completion.description: Save the event and verify the new title in the calendar view
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a final screenshot showing the Odoo Calendar view with the event successfully saved and displaying the new title 'Q3 Marketing Results & Q4 Strategy Planning'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface in a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo Calendar interface in a web browser, not a text editor or database management tool.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to update the database
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be using curl, python scripts, or direct database queries in a terminal to rename the event.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing event rather than deleting and recreating it
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the agent clicking on the existing event and editing it, rather than clicking a delete button and creating a new event from scratch.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Original event name: 'Marketing Campaign Review'. Target event name: 'Q3 Marketing Results & Q4 Strategy Planning'. Required attendees to preserve: 'Alice Johnson' and 'Carol Martinez'. Required location to preserve: 'Zoom Meeting'. Required description snippet to preserve: 'Review Q3 marketing campaign results'.
